zh.lifeSummary: 當Juliana de Vesci於1250年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德阿恩維克時，她的父親Sir William de Vesci45歲，母親Agnes de Ferrers 'The Elder'28歲。她於1292年與Richard de Vernon在英國德比夏爾哈登 霍爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世在英國爾希布盧可，埋葬在英國爾希布盧可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Juliana de Vesci于1250年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德阿恩維克时，她的父亲Sir William de Vesci45岁，母亲Agnes de Ferrers 'The Elder'28岁。她于1292年与Richard de Vernon在英国德比夏爾哈登 霍爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世在英国爾希布盧可，埋葬在英国爾希布盧可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vesci
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian (Calabria): patronymic or plural form of   Vescio  .

variants.name: Vescio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Antonio, Carmela, Ettore, Pasquale, Serafino, Vito.

Italian: probably a nickname from Calabrese dialect vesciu ‘cross-eyed person’ or vescia ‘kind of mushroom’. In Italy the surname is most frequent in Calabria, specifically in Lamezia Terme in Catanzaro province.

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Juliana de Vesci was born in 1250, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William de Vesci, was 45 and her mother, Agnes de Ferrers 'The Elder', was 28. She married Richard de Vernon in 1292, in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, and was buried in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juliana de Vesci est née en 1250, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William de Vesci, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Ferrers 'The Elder', avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Vernon en 1292, à Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée à Shipbrook, Cheshire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Shipbrook, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Juliana de Vesci 1250 in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Vesci 45 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Ferrers 'The Elder' 28. Sie hat 1292 in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England Richard de Vernon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England und wurde in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana de Vesci è nata il nel 1250 nel Alnwick, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William de Vesci, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Ferrers 'The Elder', aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Vernon nel 1292, nel Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, e fu sepolta a Shipbrook, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Juliana de Vesciが1250年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックで生まれた時，父Sir William de Vesciは45歳，母Agnes de Ferrers 'The Elder'は28歳であった。1292年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアハッドオン ハルでRichard de Vernonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスチェシュアイアシュイプブルークで死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアシュイプブルークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliana de Vesci(이)가 1250년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Vesci(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Ferrers 'The Elder'(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1292년 영국 더비실르 하던 홀에서 Richard de Vernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 체실르 시브룩에서 사망했으며 영국 체실르 시브룩에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana de Vesci nasceu em 1250, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William de Vesci, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Ferrers 'The Elder', tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de Vernon em 1292, em Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juliana de Vesci родилась в 1250 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William de Vesci было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Ferrers 'The Elder', 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Vernon в 1292 г. в местности хаддон холл, дирбишир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в местности шипбрук, чешир, Англия и была похоронена в местности шипбрук, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Juliana de Vesci nació en 1250, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William de Vesci, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Agnes de Ferrers 'The Elder', tenía 28 años. Se casó con Richard de Vernon en 1292, en Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
